discovery.title: Connect to Streamer
discovery.subtitle: Scan your network to find v3xctrl streamers
discovery.browserWarning: Your browser does not support local network access from HTTPS. Please use a Chromium-based browser (Chrome, Edge, Opera) or access this page directly from your streamer.

calibration.serviceWarning: Calibration cannot be run while control service is running. Stop the control service first!
calibration.steeringNote: Set min value first: Decrease until the servo makes clicking noises (or your preferred maximum is reached) and then increase one or two steps back. Do the same for the max value, just in the other direction. Once min and max are set, trim until steering is straight.
calibration.throttleNote: Check the order of operation for calibrating your ESC. Usually it involves sending throttle min (Reverse), max (Forward) and idle (neutral). You will most likely not need to adjust min and max, but rather send those 3 throttle values in a specific order (according to your ESCs manual). You might need to send min or max value even before plugging in the ESC.

camera.serviceWarning: Camera settings cannot be applied while video service is stopped. Start the video service first!
camera.note: In live mode, some values need to be applied multiple times before they stick.
camera.lensNote: This setting will only update when autofocus is disabled in camera settings!
camera.gainNote: This setting will only update when "Gain Control" is set to manual in camera settings!
camera.exposureNote: This setting will only update when "Exposure Control" is set to manual in camera settings!

modem.serviceWarning: Modem info cannot be shown while control service is running. Stop the control service first!
modem.fetchingSlow: Fetching modem info - this can take up to a minute...

system.safeToTurnOff: It is safe to turn off now.
system.waitingForReconnect: Waiting for streamer to come back online...
system.reconnectFailedMsg: Could not reconnect to streamer within 90 seconds.

errors.fetchFailed: Failed to load data from streamer
